name: aggregator processes _universal/ folder before any plugin namespace folder
setup:
cat > tree/_universal/cl-discipline.yaml << 'EOF'
source:
  id: claude-tdd-pro-universal
  authoritative_publisher: claude-tdd-pro
  authoritative_url: https://example.com/universal
  registry_link: STANDARDS-URLS.yaml
  fetched_at: 2026-05-09T08:00:00Z
  content_hash: sha256:u
rules:
  - id: g-universal-cl-size
    name: cl-size
    description: CL size limit.
    detector: rubric/detectors/cl-size.sh
recommended_set: [g-universal-cl-size]
all_set: [g-universal-cl-size]
EOF

cat > tree/google/tsguide.yaml << 'EOF'
source:
  id: google-tsguide
  authoritative_publisher: Google LLC
  authoritative_url: https://google.github.io/styleguide/tsguide.html
  registry_link: STANDARDS-URLS.yaml
  fetched_at: 2026-05-09T08:00:00Z
  content_hash: sha256:g
rules:
  - id: g-ts-001
    name: no-any
    description: Avoid any.
    detector: rubric/detectors/no-any.sh
recommended_set: [g-ts-001]
all_set: [g-ts-001]
EOF
